The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Ryuuji
The Takasu Family.description: A stay-at-home dad who always takes great care of his family. He goes to great lengths to ensure that his children are well-fed and his wife comes back from work to a clean home. While the people around him fear the glare from his sanpaku eyes, his children seek comfort in his gentle gaze. Even though his daughters struggle at school and his wife gets stressed from her role as a mother, he continues to work to his strengths, ensuring his meals put bright smiles on their faces.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Taiga
The Takasu Family.description: The breadwinner and matriarch of the family. With her strong fighting spirit and charisma, she became a feisty and wealthy salarywoman to support her family of six, but being a mother has been an absolute nightmare. The fear of where her daughters will be in the future is constantly looming over her, and she feels totally powerless over them, especially with how much bigger they were compared to her. Well, as long as everyone comes home at the end of the day, they'll be fine, right?

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Haruko
The Takasu Family.description: The first and the oldest of the Takasu sisters... by about six minutes. Takasu Haruko is the smartest of the triplets. Well, she isn't that smart, since she's one of the lower performing students of the class, but she's always trying to help her sisters just barely pass their exams. In the end, she's just doing everything she can to fit in.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Mitsuko
The Takasu Family.description: Compared to her sisters, she's a lot more passive and mellow. She always tries to be kind wherever she can, but she has a lot of trouble speaking up. She usually finds herself getting between her sisters, while her sisters are always trying to protect her from any threats that come her way. She really, really loves books, so much so that it disrupts her focus in class. While she hides from the world outside her books, her wish to share this love of books remains.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Katsuko
The Takasu Family.description: All brawn, no brains. That's what she is. Her strength helps her knock any obstacles out of her sisters' way. She's the most hostile of the sisters, so most won't dare mess with her. She isn't afraid to get violent to protect the secure triangle the sisters have formed. The only one that can take her on is Haruko, who is always trying to get her study.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Yuuchi
The Takasu Family.description: The youngest in the family and an avid gamer. He does well in school, and has friends he can play with. The last thing he wants is to end up like his sisters. Especially Katsuko, who's always picking on him. His mother is extremely doting, and he wants to live up to her expectations.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Yasuko
The Takasu Family.description: The grandmother to the Takasu sisters. During their early years, she was basically a third parent, easing the burden on Taiga and Ryuuji. They're always happy to see her, especially Mitsuko, who had grown closest to her.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Koigakubo Yuri
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A woman in her 50s returning to her teaching job after her son enrolled into the high school she taught at. She also got to keep her family name after marrying.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Sagawa Kaito
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A young man with the one and only goal to care for the family that his parents had worked so hard to build. He studies long hours to maintain his good grades with a part-time job on the side to alleviate his single mother's financial burdens. He's not someone that likes to spend time messing around, nor does he want anyone else's pity. He needs to stay focused to keep everything from falling apart. Unfortunately for him, one girl would become his biggest distraction: Takasu Haruko.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Ninomae Arisa
Class 2-C of 2029.description: She's always trying to stay true to herself no matter what, even if it makes herself look a little too serious sometimes. Lightening up isn't easy for her, but as Takasu Mitsuko's best friend, she tries to become someone more fun to be around. At the same time, she helps Mitsuko keep her head out of the clouds.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Kishida Mie
Class 2-C of 2029.description: While she likes to act pervy and aloof, her hidden perceptiveness has led her to be rather antisocial. Drawn in by her passion for (adult) books, Takasu Mitsuko would approach her with the intention of becoming friends, regardless of how many times she would get turned down. Through their bond, they learn to become more open about themselves.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Koigakubo Tarou
Class 2-C of 2029.description: His struggle to speak makes him a really quiet boy. Most of his responses come in the form of a shake or a nod, and any word that leaves his mouth is barely audible. He even has a hard time talking to his own mother. Even though his grades are alright, his lack of sociability leaves more to be desired. That's why he chose to join the student council in hopes of becoming more proactive. His days there wouldn't be easy, but through all his troubles, he'd start to grow closer to Takano Saki, his classmate who would join the council alongside him.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Takano Saki
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A short and plump girl with a strong will and a heart of gold. Despite her small size, she never holds herself back from achieving big things. The harmony of the classroom amongst all the students in her class is of utmost importance, so she always delivers a big smile to everyone she talks to. She's destined for student council president!

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Yoshida Satoshi
Class 2-C of 2029.description: He's a little aloof and likes hanging around Katsuko (to her dismay).

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Kogarashi Hitomi
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A transfer student with looks that can make all the girls swoon (even Katsuko!). What happened at his old school remains a secret to all his new classmates as he tries to integrate himself into Ohashi High School. Once he feels comfortable in his new school life, his true character begins to unfold.

The Sagawa Family.name: Sagawa Michika
The Sagawa Family.description: Kaito's youngest sister. She's only in elementary school, so her mother and her siblings always try to drive her attention away from their struggles so she can lead each day with a smile. She's a big fan of Haruko, too.

The Sagawa Family.name: Sagawa Umika
The Sagawa Family.description: Kaito's little sister. A twin. She enjoys arts and crafts with her little sister, but needs Kaito to fund it behind their mother's back. Despite their circumstances, and while she doesn't express it, seeing her mother and brother put their family before their own health never makes her happy.

The Sagawa Family.name: Sagawa Yoshito
The Sagawa Family.description: Kaito's little brother. A twin. The type to quietly fulfil his responsibilities as a member of his struggling family. He gets plenty of joy out of playing football, so he's not one to complain.

The Sagawa Family.name: Sagawa Fumika
The Sagawa Family.description: Kaito's mother. She works herself down to the bone to support her children. While their living conditions are less than desirable, and the quality time she spends with Kaito has dwindled, she always puts on a big smile and keeps moving forward with the way things are.

The Noto Family.name: Noto Hisanosuke
The Noto Family.description: The child of Noto Maya and Noto Hisamitsu, and Takasu Yuuchi's closest friend/gaming buddy.

The Noto Family.name: Noto Hisamitsu
The Noto Family.description: An old friend of Ryuuji's from his time at Ohashi High School. Despite his rocky marriage with his once high school crush, he's always open to giving Ryuuji some (less than helpful) advice.

The Noto Family.name: Noto Maya
The Noto Family.description: Formerly Kihara Maya. Somehow, after all their fights, she married Noto Hisamitsu and had a child. Their life together has been anything but smooth, but there's just enough love for it to last. She's now carrying a second child, a girl. She had gone years without speaking to Nanako, too.

Friends.name: Ogawa Aiko
Friends.description: A colleague of Taiga's. They became close friends through work, dedicated to supporting each other.

Friends.name: Kushieda Minori
Friends.description: Playing to become softball world champion in America. She plans on settling down in Japan with her American fiancee after winning and takes on a job as a softball coach after retiring. She also likes to treat Taiga and her family when she gets the chance.

Friends.name: Kitamura Yuusaku
Friends.description: He married Kanou Sumire after completing his studies in America. He now has a stable job and looks after his three children while their mother is in space.

Friends.name: Kawashima Ami
Friends.description: She's become as wealthy as her mother and so famous that she needs bodyguards. She started branching out of modelling to become an actress. She's also really close to Taiga and Ryuuji's daughters, hanging out with them every now and then. She even helped to purchase Taiga and Ryuuji's new home for them.
